rule_name: Sustained authentication brute force against internet-facing RDP
description: 1,247 failed RDP authentication attempts observed against rdp-bastion-01 over a 4 hour window. Source IPs span 12 distinct addresses within 192.241.137.0/24 (DigitalOcean droplet range historically used by RDP brute force operators). Targeted accounts include Administrator, admin, sa, ops, jenkins, deploy. No successful authentications.
